gate_tests.description: G1: Classification gate requires task_context.json with all 4 axes
gate_tests.expected: G1 shows passed or properly explains why not

gate_tests.rationale: Ranking implementations without correctness invalidates all comparisons

gate_tests.description: G13: Code Review override must record approver and risks
gate_tests.config_check: config/gates.yaml overrides.G13.must_record contains override_reason and approver
gate_tests.restriction: Override results are DRAFT only, never formal ranking
